advanced.name: Lunar Spear Assembly
advanced.passive: You gain Polearm Master. Opportunity attacks made with this weapon deal additional damage equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

active.effect: You may make an opportunity attack even if it normally would not provoke one.

advanced.name: Grim Glaive Assembly
advanced.passive: You gain Sentinel. Creatures you hit have their speed reduced by 10 feet until the end of their next turn.

active.trigger: You hit a creature with an opportunity attack
active.effect: The creature’s speed becomes 0 until the end of its next turn.

advanced.name: Phantom Saber Chassis
advanced.passive: You gain Mobile. You ignore disadvantage on melee attacks caused by darkness, invisibility, or light obscurement.

active.effect: Until the end of this turn, your melee attacks do not provoke opportunity attacks.

advanced.name: Executioner Greatblade Frame
advanced.passive: You gain Great Weapon Master. Once per turn when you reduce a creature to 0 HP, you may move 5 feet and make one melee attack.

active.effect: Your next melee hit this turn deals maximum weapon damage.

advanced.name: Siege Hammer Mount
advanced.passive: You gain Crusher. When you push a creature into an object or another creature, both take bludgeoning damage equal to your Intelligence modifier.

active.effect: Until the end of this turn, any push you cause increases by 5 feet.

advanced.name: Locking Pike Assembly
advanced.passive: You gain Slasher. Opportunity attacks reduce the target’s speed to 0 until the end of its turn.

active.effect: You may make two opportunity attacks against the same target instead of one.

advanced.name: Rimebound Edge
advanced.passive: When you reduce a creature’s speed, it has disadvantage on its next attack roll.

active.effect: The next creature you hit must succeed on a Constitution save or be restrained until the end of its next turn.

advanced.name: Disruptive Shock Edge
advanced.passive: Creatures you hit cannot benefit from reactions granted by class features or feats until the start of their next turn.

active.effect: End one magical effect on the target with a spell level less than or equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

advanced.name: Rending Serrated Edge
advanced.passive: Bleed damage from this edge may stack twice.

active.effect: The bleed damage triggers immediately and again at the start of the target’s next turn.

advanced.name: Phasing Edge
advanced.passive: Your melee attacks ignore resistance.

active.effect: The next melee attack you hit ignores immunity to its damage type.

advanced.name: Solar Brand Edge
advanced.passive: When you hit a creature, the next attack made against it before the end of your next turn has advantage.

active.effect: The target sheds bright light and cannot become invisible until the end of its next turn.

advanced.name: Dominating Grasp Edge
advanced.passive: When you pull a creature, it takes bludgeoning damage equal to your Intelligence modifier.

active.effect: Pull the target 15 feet and knock it prone (Strength save negates).

advanced.name: Overclocked Core
advanced.passive: Increase firearm damage die by one step.

active.effect: Double the firearm damage dice for this attack. You take force damage equal to the number of dice rolled.

advanced.name: Gravitic Core
advanced.passive: Firearm attacks deal 1d10 force damage.

active.effect: Pull the target 10 feet toward you. Creatures adjacent to the landing space must succeed on a Strength save or fall prone.

advanced.name: Echo Core
advanced.passive: Firearm attacks deal 1d8 thunder damage.

active.effect: Repeat the attack against the same target at half damage.

advanced.name: Predator Core
advanced.passive: Firearm attacks deal additional damage equal to your Proficiency Bonus if the target is below half HP.

active.effect: Treat the target as below half HP for this attack.

advanced.name: Cataclysm Core
advanced.passive: Firearm attacks deal 1d10 force damage.

active.effect: On hit, all creatures within 10 feet take half the firearm damage.

advanced.name: Fracture Channel
advanced.passive: On hit, the shot splits into two 10-foot lines, each dealing half damage.

active.effect: Both lines deal full damage.

advanced.name: Cyclone Channel
advanced.passive: Firearm attacks affect a 10-foot radius (Dexterity save for half).

active.effect: Creatures failing the save are knocked prone.

advanced.name: Threading Channel
advanced.passive: Your shots may bend around corners as long as the total path is visible.

active.effect: Ignore line of sight for this attack.

advanced.name: Pursuit Channel
advanced.passive: Creatures that move after being hit take damage equal to your Intelligence modifier.

active.effect: The creature’s movement provokes opportunity attacks.

advanced.name: Crater Channel
advanced.passive: The impact space becomes difficult terrain.

active.effect: The area becomes hazardous; creatures entering it take 1d6 force damage.

advanced.name: Vanguard Frame
advanced.passive: Enemies within 5 feet of you have disadvantage on attacks against creatures other than you.

active.effect: Force a creature within 10 feet to target you (Wisdom save negates).

advanced.name: Juggernaut Frame
advanced.passive: You ignore difficult terrain.

active.effect: Gain resistance to all damage until the start of your next turn.

advanced.name: Repositioning Frame
advanced.passive: Standing from prone costs no movement.

active.effect: Teleport 15 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

advanced.name: Counterstrike Frame
advanced.passive: Once per round when you reduce damage with a reaction, your next attack deals additional damage equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

active.effect: Make one melee attack as part of the same reaction.

advanced.name: Emergency Override Frame
advanced.passive: When you drop below half your hit points, you gain +1 AC.

active.effect: End all negative conditions affecting you.
